channel.title: PYRANA Daily
channel.description: Daily AI agent research, narrated. Two hosts unpack the day's most interesting papers from PYRANA Research Intelligence.
channel.itunes:author: Zeroth Agents

item.title: PYRANA Research Intelligence — April 30, 2026
item.description: Okay so imagine you're an AI agent, and every time you face a new situation, you can dynamically reach into a toolkit and assemble exactly the right skills on the fly. That's the core idea behind a paper called Bian Que, and honestly it might be the most practically useful thing we've read all week. Bian Que, named after the legendary Chinese physician by the way, and the metaphor actually works —
